scripts.deploy:base: graph codegen && graph build --network base && pnpm exec goldsky subgraph deploy sup/$npm_package_version --path ./build
scripts.tag:base: pnpm exec goldsky subgraph tag create sup/$npm_package_version --tag prod
scripts.deploy:base-sepolia: graph codegen && graph build --network base-sepolia && pnpm exec goldsky subgraph deploy sup_test/$npm_package_version --path ./build
scripts.tag:base-sepolia: pnpm exec goldsky subgraph tag create sup_test/$npm_package_version --tag prod
